name: MoneyGram
description_short: 15500 Euclid Ave, East Cleveland, OH — MoneyGram check-cashing and money transfer services open Mon–Sat.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates a standalone check-cashing location at 15500 Euclid Ave in East Cleveland, OH. This branch is conveniently situated for East Cleveland residents seeking quick check-cashing and financial services. Hours are Monday through Thursday 9 AM–7 PM, Friday 9 AM–8 PM, and Saturday 9 AM–6 PM; the location is closed on Sundays.

At this East Cleveland location, MoneyGram provides check cashing, money transfer services, and other financial solutions. To verify current service availability or ask specific questions, customers can call the location directly at 216-268-4100 during business hours.

If you need to cash a check in East Cleveland, this MoneyGram branch is open late on weekdays and has Saturday hours for weekend banking needs. Bring a valid photo ID and the check you wish to cash. Whether you're managing a regular paycheck or sending money to family, this location provides reliable service to the East Cleveland community.
pros: 29+ locations across Cleveland for convenient access to money transfer services
Integration with major retailers like Walmart and CVS for easily accessible partner locations
Hybrid online and offline service model allows both digital transfers and in-person walk-in transactions
Extended hours at many locations (some open until 11:59 PM) accommodating diverse customer schedules
Multiple partner types (grocery stores, pharmacies, check cashers) providing varied neighborhood access
No requirement to maintain separate bank account for using transfer services
Simple search function by address, city, state, or ZIP code to locate nearest service point
cons: Service quality and hours depend entirely on individual partner retailer policies and management
No standalone MoneyGram locations—customers must navigate partner store environments to access services
Limited to money transfer and payment functions; does not offer banking, lending, or credit products
No indication of competitive fee structure or rate transparency on the website's location finder
Partner locations may impose additional restrictions or requirements beyond MoneyGram's control
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer cash-based transactions and in-person service
Individuals sending regular remittances domestically or internationally without a traditional bank account
Customers seeking convenience and flexible hours at neighborhood retail locations for money transfers
People who need after-hours access to financial services through extended-hour retail partners
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and frequent money senders who value convenient neighborhood access to transfer services without requiring a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is that MoneyGram is a money transfer service only—not a comprehensive financial provider—and service reliability varies significantly based on individual partner retailer operations and policies.
services: Domestic money transfers via online or offline channels
International money remittances to recipients outside the United States
In-person walk-in money transfer services at partner locations
Online money transfer management and tracking
Bill payment services through partner locations
Money order issuance at select partner locations
Wire transfer services at participating agents
Cash pickup and delivery of received transfers
Mobile and online transfer platform access
Multi-location service network for flexible transaction access
meta_description: MoneyGram at 15500 Euclid Ave, East Cleveland, OH. Check cashing and money transfers.
